state.next-action: `19-03` is now shipped: `/api/resend/webhook` verifies Resend deliveries, `src/lib/media/resendInboundMedia.ts` promotes accepted inbound email attachments into first-party `media` records, and each delivery writes final audit state onto `inbound-media-ingestions` for ops review and replay-safe handling. Configure `RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, point the Resend `email.received` webhook at the local or deployed route, send a message with image or video attachments to the inbound address, then resume `19-02` with the composer/media drawer using those new media records.
